news.headline: Nationwide wins 5th consecutive DALBAR Customer Experience Excellence Award, showcasing commitment to exceptional service.
news.summary: In Marlborough, Massachusetts on October 10, 2024, Nationwide has been recognized for its exceptional customer service, receiving the prestigious DALBAR Customer Experience Excellence Award for the fifth consecutive time. This award highlights Nationwide's commitment to delivering top-notch service to its customers.

news.headline: Italy elevators and escalators market is projected to grow by 0.89% from 2023-2029. Top 4 vendors hold 60% market share.
news.summary: A report on the Italy Elevators and Escalators market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. It forecasts a CAGR of 0.89% for the market from 2023 to 2029. The top 4 vendors in Italy, Otis, KONE, Schindler, and TK Elevator, hold a collective 60% market share. Italy is ranked as the second country globally in terms of elevator and escalator market size.

news.headline: Cofense PhishMe wins Best Email Security Solution of the Year award combining AI, ML, human intelligence to stop advanced phishing threats.
news.summary: A company based in Leesburg, Virginia, Cofense®, specializing in email threat detection and response solutions, was recently awarded the title of Best Email Security Solution of the Year by the Cybersecurity Breakthrough Awards. This prestigious recognition highlights Cofense's innovative method of integrating artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), and human-vetted intelligence to combat sophisticated phishing attacks that can evade traditional secure email gateways (SEGs). By leveraging the latest advancements in AI and ML technologies, Cofense has successfully developed a comprehensive approach to mitigate email-based cyber threats.

news.headline: BZI showcases commitment to Utah communities and Innovation Park at 2024 One Utah Summit on Oct 7-9.
news.summary: BZI, an OSHA-certified company based in Kanarraville, Utah, showcased its dedication to local communities and forward-thinking strategies at the One Utah Summit from October 7-9, 2024. The event highlighted BZI's innovative approach and commitment to fostering growth and development in Utah, emphasizing their contributions to the region's economic and social well-being.

news.headline: Forcura obtained HITRUST r2 Certification for its tech platform, ensuring top-level security. Platform includes MyForcura, Forcura IQ, Circle, and Analytics.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, healthcare workflow management company Forcura has announced that its entire technology platform, including MyForcura, Forcura IQ, Forcura Circle, and Forcura Analytics, has received certified status by HITRUST for information security. This certification, HITRUST r2 Certification, confirms that Forcura's technology platform meets regulatory compliance and industry-defined requirements, effectively managing risk.

news.headline: Sysdig named Company of the Year for Containers and Kubernetes Security by Frost & Sullivan. Appointed Omer Azaria as new Chief Product Officer.
news.summary: Sysdig, a prominent figure in real-time cloud security based in San Francisco, has achieved the esteemed title of "Company of the Year" for container and Kubernetes security, as awarded by Frost & Sullivan. Moreover, they have welcomed Omer Azaria as their new Chief Product Officer (CPO). Sysdig's distinction lies in its robust CNAPP, which sets it apart from competitors due to its unparalleled real-time security measures across the cloud life cycle, as stated by Daphne Dwiputr.

news.headline: Russian Deputy Foreign Minister: A new meeting of the "nuclear five" will be held in New York in the near future - RIA.
Paige's AI technology Alba, showcased by Microsoft at HLTH 2024 conference as transformative AI for healthcare.
news.summary: In New York, Paige, a top AI technology provider, revealed that Microsoft is highlighting their foundation models at the Las Vegas HLTH 2024 conference. This technology is praised as revolutionary for healthcare. Matt Lungren, MD, Microsoft Health & Life Sciences’ Chief Scientific Officer, will present during a live seminar on October 21st, discussing the impact of AI foundation models on healthcare. Paige’s CEO & CTO, Razik Yousfi, will also be a part of this presentation.

news.headline: FireMon's Policy Manager wins "Policy Management Solution of the Year" award in 2024 CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards Program.
news.summary: FireMon, a top network security policy management (NSPM) company, based in Lenexa, Kansas, has been recognized for its Policy Manager solution. It has won the prestigious “Policy Management Solution of the Year” award in the 8th annual CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards program. The program was conducted by CyberSecurity Breakthrough, a respected independent market intelligence organization. FireMon's Policy Manager solution was chosen as the winner, highlighting its excellence in providing visibility, control, agility, and automation to enterprise cloud and hybrid network infrastructure. This recognition underlines FireMon's dedication to innovation and security in the industry.

news.headline: KAGA FEI launches ES4L15BA1 BLE module, reducing development time and certification costs for IoT products, like wearables.
news.summary: KAGA FEI Co., Ltd., a prominent supplier of short-distance wireless modules worldwide, introduced the ES4L15BA1 Bluetooth Low Energy module in Yokohama, Japan. This new module features a built-in antenna and has received multiple certifications. As a result, it streamlines the development process and lowers certification expenses for upcoming wireless IoT products like IoT devices, small healthcare products, and wearables that demand a compact design. The ES4L15BA1 module enables quicker time-to-market for these products.

news.headline: eClinicalWorks partners with Sun Life Health, saving 2 hours daily per provider with Sunoh.ai for multilingual clinical documentation.
news.summary: In Westborough, Massachusetts, eClinicalWorks has revealed that Sun Life Health is effectively utilizing Sunoh.ai’s multilingual feature to improve and simplify clinical documentation of patient visits in both English and Spanish languages. By utilizing Sunoh.ai, providers can save up to two hours daily, allowing them to cater to more patients, prioritize better patient care, and reduce burnout while enhancing work-life balance. eClinicalWorks is recognized as the largest ambulatory cloud EHR platform.

news.headline: Fastenal (NASDAQ:FAST) will report $0.51 EPS on 2024-10-11. Previous quarter EPS missed by $0.00, leading to 0.0% share drop. Shares at $70.61, up 16.55% in 52 weeks. Analysts rate Buy with $73.25 price target for 3.74% upside potential.
news.summary: Fastenal (NASDAQ:FAST) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on October 11, 2024, with analysts anticipating an EPS of $0.51. Investors are eager for the announcement, hoping for results exceeding estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter. In the previous quarter, the company's EPS missed by $0.00, leading to a 0.0% drop in share price the following day. Fastenal's stock was trading at $70.61 as of October 9, with a 16.55% increase over the past 52 weeks. Analysts have given Fastenal a consensus rating of Buy, with an average one-year price target of $73.25, indicating a potential 3.74% upside. Understanding market sentiments and industry expectations is critical for investors ahead of the earnings report.

news.headline: iConnections and MFA announce Global Alts Miami 2025 conference with distinguished speakers on Jan 27-30 at Miami Beach CC.
news.summary: iConnections and MFA announced their collaboration for the Global Alts Miami Conference, set to take place from January 27-30, 2025, at the Miami Beach Convention Center. This event will bring together asset allocators and investment managers in the alternative asset management industry. The conference aims to feature a lineup of prominent speakers and focus on key themes. It is anticipated to be the most extensive gathering of its kind, offering a valuable networking and educational opportunity for attendees.

news.headline: Bank of New York Mellon to report EPS of $1.39, investors hope for exceeding estimates. Stock up 79.31% in 52-week period. Analysts rate Neutral, with $72.43 target price.
news.summary: Bank of New York Mellon (NYSE:BK) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on 2024-10-11, with analysts expecting an EPS of $1.39. Investors are optimistic about surpassing estimates and upbeat guidance for the next quarter. Understanding that guidance influences stock prices is crucial. Last quarter, the company exceeded EPS by $0.08, with a subsequent 0.0% share price drop the next day. Shares were trading at $74.02 on 2024-10-09, up 79.31% over 52 weeks. Analysts rate the stock as Neutral, with an average one-year price target of $72.43. Stay informed on market sentiments for better decision-making.

news.headline: FusionTek acquires dpe Systems, its second acquisition in a year, strengthening its IT capabilities in Seattle area.
news.summary: A Kirkland-based IT managed service provider, FusionTek, has recently acquired Seattle-based IT company, dpe Systems. This acquisition is the second within a year for FusionTek, showcasing their strategic approach in expanding their services. By targeting companies that complement their offerings, FusionTek aims to provide more comprehensive solutions to their clients. FusionTek, headquartered in the greater Seattle area, continues to strengthen its presence in the market through strategic acquisitions.

news.headline: Zumigo DeRiskify wins "Fraud Prevention Innovation of the Year" award in 2024 CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards.
news.summary: A company based in San Jose, California, Zumigo DeRiskify, has been awarded the title of “Fraud Prevention Innovation of the Year” in the CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards program for the year 2024. This prestigious recognition highlights the innovative approach taken by Zumigo DeRiskify in combating fraud.

news.headline: BlackRock's upcoming earnings estimated at $10.23 EPS, with positive market sentiment and a 52.17% stock rise in 52 weeks. Consensus rating: Outperform, price target $978.12.
news.summary: BlackRock (NYSE: BLK) is set to announce its quarterly earnings with analysts expecting an EPS of $10.23. Investors are eager for the company to surpass estimates and provide positive guidance for the next quarter. In the last quarter, BlackRock beat EPS estimates by $0.41, leading to a 2.55% increase in share price the following day. As of October 09, shares were trading at $955.92, with a 52.17% increase in the past 52 weeks. Analysts have given BlackRock an average consensus rating of Outperform, with a one-year price target of $978.12 indicating a potential 2.32% upside. news.headline: Bank7 (NASDAQ: BSVN) to report $1.07 EPS on Friday. Analysts optimistic for positive growth announcement.

Investors are looking for Bank7 to surpass this estimate and potentially reveal positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Metropolitan Bank Holding (NYSE: MCB) is expected to report an EPS of $1.57 on 2024-07-18. Investors are eager for the announcement.
news.summary: Metropolitan Bank Holding (NYSE:MCB) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on Thursday, July 18, 2024. Analysts predict the company will reveal an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.57. Investors are eagerly awaiting the announcement as expectations are high for Metropolitan Bank Holding's performance.

news.headline: Church Mutual warns organizations post-storm of contractor fraud risks, especially after Hurricanes Helene or Milton, to prevent financial losses.
news.summary: Protecting against contractor fraud is crucial for organizations with storm-related property damage. This becomes especially important post major storms like Hurricane Helene or Milton. The aftermath of such storms sees a significant rise in contractor fraud risks. Unscrupulous contractors tend to prey on vulnerable organizations by offering unsolicited repair services, putting them at risk of financial losses. It is essential to be cautious of unsolicited offers to avoid falling victim to this deceit. Stay vigilant and safeguard against potential fraud post-storm to protect your organization from incurring further losses.

news.headline: Richelieu sees increased sales with $467.7 million in Q3, up 1.9%, and $1.36 billion in 9 months. EBITDA at $53.0 million and $147.2M$, respectively. New acquisitions planned. Dividend of $0.15. Positive outlook due to housing shortage.
news.summary: Richelieu, a Canadian company, reported strong performance in the U.S. manufacturers market in the third quarter of 2024, with sales totaling $467.7 million, up 1.9%. Sales in Canada were $264.6 million, and in the U.S. were US$148.4 million, up 4.8%. The company had an EBITDA of $53.0 million with a margin of 11.3%, and a net income of $22.7 million. For the nine-month period, sales were $1.36 billion, up 1.6%, with $773.0 million in Canada and US$428.8 million in the U.S. The company also had agreements in principle for four new acquisitions. Richelieu's president believes the housing shortage in North America presents opportunities, and they are well-positioned for growth. The company is continuing its acquisition strategy and optimizing its distribution centre network.

news.headline: KOSPET launches X2 and S2 series wearables on Oct 10, 2024. X2 series features X2 Ultra and X2 models with military-grade toughness and elegant design.
news.summary: KOSPET, based in Shenzhen, China, a leading brand in rugged wearable technology, has unveiled its newest products: the X2 and S2 series wearables. From October 10, 2024, these devices will be available for consumers seeking durability in their active lifestyles. The X2 Series offers the X2 Ultra and X2 models, blending robust military-grade durability with stylish aesthetics. These wearables are designed to cater to adventure enthusiasts and individuals looking for sophistication in their accessories.

news.headline: Zoovu AI platform for product discovery now on Microsoft Azure Marketplace.
news.summary: Zoovu has unveiled its product discovery experiences on the Microsoft Azure Marketplace in Boston.

news.headline: Great American Media starts 'Great American Christmas 2024' early on Great American Family on October 11, festival opens November 22 in New York at Northwell Park at UBS Arena, with tickets on sale now. Stars to take fan questions on October 11 via Facebook Live.
news.summary: Get ready for the holiday season in New York! The Great American Family Christmas Festival will kick off on November 22 at the renowned Northwell Park at UBS Arena. Tickets are now available for purchase. Don't miss the chance to ask questions to the stars on October 11 through a Facebook Live session. This exciting event is set to attract a large audience, so be sure to secure your spot soon.

news.headline: New report by Dinova and Technomic shows business travel growth as opportunity for restaurants amid weakening consumer sales.
news.summary: The newest State of Business Dining Report by Dinova and Technomic has released fresh data showing a crucial growth factor for restaurants dealing with declining consumer sales and sentiment. The report, released on October 10, 2024, in Atlanta, highlights key insights for the industry. Dinova Inc., specializing in business dining, and Technomic, a prominent research and consulting firm, collaborated on the report. This partnership showcases the significance of adapting to changing consumer behavior to thrive in today's market.

news.headline: Cetera ranks 2nd on Financial Planning IBD Elite 2024 list for fast growth in independent brokerages.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Cetera Financial Group revealed that its financial advisor Wealth Hub has secured the title of the second-quickest growing independent brokerage. This recognition comes from Financial Planning, a notable industry publication. The company earned a spot on the Financial Planning IBD Elite 2024 list, showcasing its rapid growth and success within the financial sector.

news.headline: Repli names Chris Vlessis as Chief Technology Officer, known for expertise in AI, AdTech, SaaS. #Atlanta #Tech #Repli
news.summary: In Atlanta on October 10, 2024, Repli, a company revolutionizing multifamily marketing, proudly introduced Chris Vlessis as their new Chief Technology Officer. Chris brings extensive experience in AI, AdTech, and SaaS industries to the role. His appointment signifies a strategic move for Repli's MultiHub division, aiming to drive innovation and disrupt the market.

news.headline: Trash Fairies chosen as national vendor for Gallery Residential, serving 100,000+ units in Southeast US. - PRNewswire, 10/10/24.
news.summary: A company providing valet trash and recycling services, headquartered in Richmond, serves approximately 100,000 housing units in the Southeastern U.S. This information was disclosed in a press release dated October 10, 2024. The company, known as Trash Fairies, specializes in offering efficient waste management solutions from doorstep pickup to dumpster disposal.

news.headline: Alta Resources praised for enhancing consumer interactions and agent efficiency. SAN ANTONIO, Oct. 10, 2024 - Frost & Sullivan recognized Alta for its market leadership, simplifying interfaces, and automating processes, ultimately improving customer experience and agent retention.
news.summary: Alta has enhanced agent interfaces and automated backend processes to enhance customer experience while increasing agent retention and satisfaction. The changes were implemented in SAN ANTONIO on October 10, 2024. Frost & Sullivan evaluated the customer experience management (CXM) sector, focusing on streamlining interfaces and backend operations.

news.headline: SeriousFun Children's Network adds Neha Aujla, Joy Errico, Emily Lamont, and Cameron Read to their Board of Directors.
news.summary: Norwalk, Connecticut - On October 10, 2024, SeriousFun Children's Network's Board of Directors happily announced the addition of four new members: Neha Aujla, Joy Errico, Emily Lamont, and Cameron Read. This charitable organization, established by the renowned actor Paul Newman, aims to provide support and hope to seriously ill children.

news.headline: FutureCeuticals shares study on CognatiQ®'s cognitive benefits, validated by Auburn University, published.
news.summary: In Momence, Illinois, on October 10, 2024, FutureCeuticals has released a new scientific article confirming the cognitive performance advantages of its patented ingredient, CognatiQ®. The research, carried out at Auburn University, showcased significant cognitive enhancement benefits. This marks another success for FutureCeuticals as they continue to innovate in the field.

news.headline: Jeff Concepcion of Stratos Wealth Partners named Hispanic CEO of the Year by Wealth Solutions Report.
news.summary: Beachwood, Ohio-based Stratos Wealth Partners (Stratos), an investment advisor under Stratos Wealth Holdings, revealed that its CEO, Jeff Concepcion, has been honored as Hispanic CEO of the Year by Wealth Solutions Report on October 10, 2024.

news.headline: VoltServer partners with Current/OS Foundation to promote DC power usage, expanding its reach and impact in the industry.
news.summary: In East Greenwich, Rhode Island, on October 10, 2024, VoltServer, a key player in fault-managed power solutions, has announced a significant partnership with the nonprofit organization Current/OS Foundation. This collaboration involves VoltServer and Current/OS Foundation, alongside their expanding consortium.

news.headline: UK's Chancellor Reeves mulls raising capital gains tax as high as 39% - Guardian.
Fission Labs raises $1.6M in pre-seed funding led by SALT Fund and Kraynos Capital, with Anthony Scaramucci participating. Launches Closed Testnet to bring VC to DeFi.
news.summary: In East Hampton, N.Y. on October 10, 2024, Fission revealed a successful pre-seed funding round of $1.6 million. The funding was spearheaded by SALT Fund and Kraynos Capital, with support from Anthony Scaramucci of Skybridge. Fission is the inaugural DeFi application designed for transferring venture capital onto the blockchain. This marks a significant milestone for the company as they officially launched their innovative platform.

news.headline: SimSpace awarded "Security Training Innovation Award" in 2024 CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards Program.
news.summary: An esteemed awards program recently honored exemplary information security products and companies on a global scale. In the city of Boston on October 10, 2024, SimSpace, a prominent US organization specializing in custom cyber ranges, proudly revealed its victory as the recipient of this prestigious accolade. The program recognized SimSpace for its exceptional contributions to the industry, solidifying its position as a leader in the field.

news.headline: Eagle Hill Consulting Employee Retention Index stable in Q3 2024, predicts declining worker turnover until 2025. Male, Millennial, Baby Boomer employees most loyal.
news.summary: According to the latest data from the Eagle Hill Consulting Employee Retention Index released on October 10, 2024, male employees, especially those from the Millennial and Baby Boomer generations, are showing higher rates of remaining with their employers. The study revealed consistent trends among government employees compared to the national figures. The index remained stable for the third quarter of 2024, indicating a strong retention rate within organizations for the period.

news.headline: Hope & Comfort Hygiene Hub launches Hygiene Insecurity Awareness Week w/ aim to distribute 500,000 products to those in need.
news.summary: Two companies, Earth Breeze and Native, are contributing to the distribution of 500,000 hygiene products for the underprivileged in NEEDHAM, Massachusetts. This initiative is led by the nonprofit organization, Hope & Comfort Hygiene Hub, which is dedicated to supplying essential hygiene products in the state. The distribution effort is scheduled to take place over the week, benefitting a significant number of individuals in need.

news.headline: FreeMove Alliance awarded "Best International Mobile Connectivity Brand, Global" at Global Brand Awards 2024 in London.

This annual event, organized by Global Brands Magazine (GBM) in London, recognizes leading brands from around the world. The award highlights FreeMove Alliance's excellence in mobile connectivity on a global scale.

news.headline: Omada wins "Overall ID Management Solution of the Year" at 8th CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards for 4th straight year.

The company, headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark, was named the winner of the "Overall ID" award. This recognition was announced on October 10, 2024. Omada's consistent success in this annual awards program showcases its industry leadership and excellence.

news.headline: Global Breach and Attack Simulation Market expected to reach USD 2,405.4 million by 2029 with 27.0% CAGR from 2024's USD 729.2 million.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of October 10, 2024, a recent report forecasts substantial growth in the global Breach and Attack Simulation Market. This data indicates a strong upward trend in the industry over the next few years.

news.headline: Wells Fargo grants $3.75M for no-cost neurodiversity workshops for corporate America by UConn, focusing on education and training.
news.summary: A substantial grant worth $3.75 million has been awarded by Wells Fargo to support the University of Connecticut's Center for Neurodiversity. This initiative aims to offer complimentary education, training, academic research, and talent networking opportunities to employers. The collaboration seeks to raise awareness and foster inclusivity towards individuals with unique neurological profiles. The grant signifies a significant investment towards promoting diversity and fostering a more inclusive workforce. This partnership showcases Wells Fargo's commitment to supporting neurodiversity initiatives and advancing educational resources in this field.

news.summary: Leading provider of business intelligence and market analysis, Verified Market Research®, has recently published a detailed report on the "Sodium Ion Battery Market Size and Forecast." The report delves into the dynamic landscape of the sodium ion battery market.

news.headline: Global workflow management system market projected to grow to $60.02 billion by 2031 at a CAGR of 24.7% from $10.23 billion in 2023.

This marks a substantial rise from the US$ 10.23 billion recorded in 2023. The market is anticipated to witness a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 24.7% during the period of 2023 to 2031. The report was published in New York on October 10, 2024, offering a comprehensive analysis of the global market trends.

news.headline: Plastic Express partners with industry leaders for fleet safety, including Netradyne, Geotab, and Gridline.

The collaboration has demonstrated noteworthy success for Plastic Express since its inception.

news.headline: Research report on combining NDT and Dimensional Metrology for superior quality assurance shows growth potential.

news.headline: Behavox's Intelligent Archive sees 100% QoQ growth, 2nd consecutive quarter. Rapid demand for modern compliance solutions.

Launched in January this year, the significant growth underscores a prevailing discontent within the market towards traditional providers and a rising need for contemporary compliance and archiving tools. news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in Pittsburgh, a service technician from Edmonton, AB, Canada expressed the challenges of facing situations without the necessary tools. The inventor highlighted the frustration of realizing that essential tools may not even exist when needed. This experience motivated them to develop a solution.

news.headline: Viral Nation partners with Wind Sun Sky to create two new 'Like Nastya' series, expanding their original content.
